Check whether the pull request changes make README.md factually outdated.

You may edit README.md only. Do not edit any other file. Update README.md only when the changed code provides clear evidence that project behavior, setup, commands, tech stack, folder structure, features, deployment, lessons learned, or future improvements are no longer accurate.

Preserve the existing Korean writing style and recruiter-friendly structure. Do not invent metrics, claims, links, features, or implementation details. Do not rewrite wording merely for style. If README.md is already accurate, make no changes.
